texto: It’s not our place to judge the guilt or innocence of the prisoners, Nurse Webster. The sooner you learn that the better. Any other approach just leads to conflicts of duty and undermines the smooth running of the institution. We are here to ensure that the prisoners are dealt with firmly and professionally. It’s up to their lawyers to handle matters pertaining to their sentences.
explicacao: Citação de Rachel Dax sobre temas ligados a sabedoria. “It’s not our place to judge the guilt or innocence of the prisoners, Nurse Webster. The sooner yo…” articula sabedoria, human-rights, husbandry em registro de sabedoria, com relevância para contextos como husbandry e justice-system.
